g.text: Top-K Selection Strategy: Computational Cost Comparison

div.p: Evaluation of total comparisons required to determine the top-k nearest neighbors after distance calculation. Metric: Total floating-point comparisons ($C$).

g.text: Total Size: 16 Bytes (Aligned to 64-bit word boundary)
O(N log N) - Naive Full Sort

ul.li: Heap: Maintains a k-element Bounded Max-Heap. Only $N$ comparisons against heap.top(). Insertions are $O(\log k)$.
Sort: Collects all $N$ distances into contiguous memory. Sorting is $O(N \log N)$ with Quicksort/Timsort.
